recommendations.title: A Little Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: An introverted young girl falls in love with a popular senior. However, as she begins to come out of her shell, she faces several new problems.
recommendations.director: Wasin Pokpong, Puttipong Promsaka Na Sakolnakorn

recommendations.title: Rebel Without a Cause

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.

recommendations.title: Disorder
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier with PTSD is hired to protect the wife and child of a wealthy Lebanese businessman while he's out of town.

recommendations.title: The Hitcher
recommendations.overview: On a stormy night, young Jim, who transports a luxury car from Chicago to California to deliver it to its owner, feeling tired and sleepy, picks up a mysterious hitchhiker, who has appeared out of nowhere, thinking that a good conversation will help

recommendations.title: Womb
recommendations.overview: A woman's consuming love forces her to bear the clone of her dead beloved. From his infancy to manhood, she faces the unavoidable complexities of her controversial decision.

recommendations.title: Management
recommendations.overview: A traveling art saleswoman tries to shake off a flaky motel manager who falls for her and won't leave her alone.

recommendations.title: Soap and Water
recommendations.overview: A school janitor pretends to be a priest in order to give private lessons to a young top model.
